subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth, and wherein lieth every wise command. Say: O people! Believe in God and in Him Whom He hath sent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و فیه کل امر حکیم قل یا قوم آمنوا بالله و بالذی ارسله
subcodes.subjects: @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
